description: CompositionBlack hooded T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mock collar, hood with drawstrings, long raglan sleeves, buttoned chest placket, knitted edges on the sleeves and side seams, ribbed cuffs and hem and branding on the left chestFittingRegularWash careHand wash with cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak,twist or wringFold and stack to maintain shapeDry in shadeWarm iron;Do not iron on decorationsSubtle and stylish, this T-shirt from the spykar speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The T-shirt enhances your style statement, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling warm and snug all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of Height:6', Shoulders:18"
